pi_items.source: Setup script (setup_task.sh:25) defines PROJECT_DIR at this path. This is the destination directory in the container where the data will be copied for the agent to open in Android Studio.
Verified in app/build.gradle.kts: namespace='com.google.samples.apps.sunflower' and applicationId='com.google.samples.apps.sunflower'. Also confirmed via Plant.kt package declaration.

Setup script (setup_task.sh:26) references DATA_SOURCE='/workspace/data/SunflowerApp', which is correct for the container environment. Actual host path is benchmarks/cua_world/environments/android_studio_env/data/SunflowerApp, which contains the real Google Sunflower sample project data.

privileged_info_summary: The SunflowerApp is a real, non-synthetic Android sample project from Google's official android/sunflower repository. All metadata claims are verified: expected_package is 'com.google.samples.apps.sunflower' (verified in app/build.gradle.kts), expected_project_name is 'SunflowerApp' (verified in settings.gradle.kts), data_source path '/workspace/data/SunflowerApp' is correct for the container environment, and the source files Plant.kt and PlantRepository.kt exist with the required data structures. The project uses Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0, Kotlin 1.9.22, compileSdk 34, minSdk 24, and targetSdk 34.
